# CityVibe

> CityVibe is an urban radio web experience that tunes listeners into city vibes
> through curated public Spotify playlists. No login required. Currently live for
> Milano, Italy.

## What it does

CityVibe streams curated Spotify public playlists embedded in a retro-styled
radio interface. Each "station" represents a neighbourhood mood or time-of-day
vibe within a specific city. Users can switch between stations with a single tap.

## Current city: Milano

### Stations

- **Navigli Nights** — 97.3 FM
  Late-night sounds from the canal district. Slow grooves, neon reflections,
  late tram echoes.

- **Duomo Drift** — 101.5 FM
  Midnight urban mood around the cathedral. Minimal beats, zero plans.

- **Porta Romana** — 88.7 FM
  Aperitivo-hour vibes from south Milano. Warm tempos, golden hour energy.

## Technology

- Framework: Next.js 15 (React 19), TypeScript
- Music: Spotify embed (public playlists, no auth required)
- Background: ambient video loop of the city

## Target audience

People who want to feel the pulse of a city through music — residents,
travellers, remote workers, and anyone tuning into Milano's urban culture.

## Entity

- Product name: CityVibe
- City focus: Milano (Milan), Italy
- Category: Music / Urban lifestyle / Web application
- Language: Italian (it-IT), English content
- URL: https://cityvibe.app
